question.label: Opening pace check
question.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
question.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

assessment.note: Skip/evasion on the energy check; no usable signal yet, and clarity remains untouched.

new_queue.label: Decision lag
new_queue.name: What decision are you waiting on that is slowing things down?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Scope tradeoff
new_queue.name: What have you said no to this fortnight?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder signal
new_queue.name: How are your updates landing with the people who need them?

new_queue.label: Sustainable load
new_queue.name: What part of your load feels hardest to sustain right now?

new_queue.label: Momentum source
new_queue.name: What part of the work is still pulling you in?

new_queue.label: Sharper next step
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
